summary: P1 Revenue Conversion Sprint - All tests PASSED. Backend: 13/13 pytest tests passed (revenue-conversion endpoint, funnel track new steps). Frontend: VideoRewardPreview modal working (Ken Burns thumbnail, ETA countdown, Make My Video CTA), mobile sticky Video chip with ₹29 + data-variant, desktop sticky CTA after Continue, Admin Revenue Conversion Panel with 5 metrics + variants leaderboard. P0 features verified (no regression): instant demo, A/B 90/10, Speed SLA panel.

tests: test_revenue_conversion_has_totals - PASS (landing_sessions, story_completed_sessions, video_cta_sessions, checkout_sessions, payment_sessions, share_clicks, revenue_inr)
test_revenue_conversion_has_metrics - PASS (5 metrics: story_completed_to_video_cta_pct, video_cta_to_checkout_pct, checkout_to_payment_pct, share_pct, revenue_per_100_visitors)

details: Mobile viewport 390x844 tested
Demo story paints immediately (no loading spinner)

Each card displays percentage value with counts

A/B 90/10 routing to headline_b working
Instant demo paints on first frame (no loading spinner)
Speed SLA panel still present in admin dashboard

critical_code_review_comments: P1.1 Outcome-led Video CTA A/B working - 5 variants stored per session in sessionStorage.video_cta_variant
P1.2 VideoRewardPreview overlay working - Ken Burns thumbnail, music waveform, subtitle preview, ETA countdown, '₹29 Make My Video' CTA
P1.5 Always-visible sticky video CTA working - desktop floating bottom-right after first Continue, mobile chip in bottom action bar
Revenue Conversion endpoint returns all 5 required metrics + video_cta_variants leaderboard
Admin dashboard /app/admin/activation renders Revenue Conversion Panel at top with 5 metric cards
Note: Admin route is /app/admin/activation (not /admin/activation as mentioned in spec)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all P1 features verified, P0 no regression)
